description: FileSDConfig defines a Prometheus file service discovery configuration See https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#file_sd_config

files.description: files defines the list of files to be used for file discovery. Recommendation: use absolute paths. While relative paths work, the prometheus-operator project makes no guarantees about the working directory where the configuration file is stored. Files must be mounted using Prometheus.ConfigMaps or Prometheus.Secrets.

refreshInterval.description: refreshInterval defines the time after which the provided names are refreshed. If not set, Prometheus uses its default value.
